message.content:
Sorry — I tried to get the current time but the time service failed (error 0xDEADBEEF) and I can’t read the clock right now.

What would you like to do next?
- I can try again to fetch the time now.
- Tell me your city or timezone (e.g., "New York" or "UTC+2") and I can help with time conversions or instructions.
- I can show quick ways to check the time on your device (Windows/macOS/Linux/phone).

Which option do you prefer?
